# VU35KB - Amateur Radio Profile (Full Index)

This document provides a comprehensive overview of the technical knowledge and content available on the VU35KB Amateur Radio platform.

## Station Overview

- **Operator**: Srinivasan KB (VU35KB)
- **License**: ASOC Restricted Grade (Govt. of India), valid until 03 July 2075.
- **Primary Rig**: Baofeng M13 Pro (VHF/UHF, 2m/70cm)
- **Operation Style**: QRP (Low Power), Portable, Digital Exploration.
- **Primary QTH**: Rajapalayam, Tamil Nadu, India (Grid: MJ89sk)
- **Secondary QTH**: Bangalore, Karnataka, India (Grid: MK82uu)

## Knowledge Base & Articles

### [Voice Communication Essentials](https://ham.srinikb.in/resources/voice-comm-basics)
A comprehensive guide to standard operating procedures:
- **NATO Phonetic Alphabet**: Alpha to Zulu for clear spelling.
- **Essential Q-Codes**: QRG, QRM, QRN, QRO, QRP, QRV, QRX, QRZ, QSB, QSL, QSO, QSY, QTH.
- **RST Signal Reporting**: Scale for Readability (1-5) and Strength (1-9).
- **Pro-words**: 73, CQ, OM, YL, XYL, DX, Rig, Shack, Roger, Over, Clear.

### [Radio Journal (Blog)](https://ham.srinikb.in/blog)
Documentation of the HAM radio learning journey:
- **Understanding Maidenhead Grid Squares**: Explanation of the MJ89sk coordinate system.
- **Unboxing the Baofeng M13 Pro**: First impressions of the primary station rig.
- **First On-Air Contact**: Narrative of the first successful 2m band QSO with VU2XYZ.

## Interactive Tools

### [Maidenhead Grid Explorer](https://ham.srinikb.in/grid)
A technical tool for visualizing radio grids:
- Converts between Latitude/Longitude and Grid Squares.
- Visualizes grid boundaries on an interactive map.
- Essential for propagation analysis and station locating.

## Contact & QSL Info
- **Email**: VU35KB@qsl.net
- **QRZ**: [VU35KB Profile](https://www.qrz.com/db/VU35KB)
- **Logbook**: QSOs are confirmed via the QRZ.com logbook.

---
73 de VU35KB
